seoTitle: How to Make a Custom Size and Print in Canva
metaDescription: Learn how to set custom dimensions in Canva for brochures, business cards, and posters, then export them ready for professional printing.
intro: Print materials like brochures, business cards, and posters often require exact, non-standard dimensions. This tutorial covers setting a custom size in Canva and preparing your finished design for print.

steps.heading: Access the custom size feature
steps.body: Locate where you can input specific dimensions when starting a new Canva project.

steps.heading: Set your dimensions
steps.body: Enter the precise measurements needed for your print material.

steps.heading: Follow design tips for custom sizes
steps.body: Adjust your layout to look balanced and professional at the chosen dimensions.

steps.heading: Export for print
steps.body: Prepare and export your custom-sized design so it's ready for professional printing.

faq.question: Why would I need a custom size instead of a standard template?
faq.answer: Custom sizing lets you match specific branding needs for materials like brochures, business cards, and posters.

faq.question: Is this feature beginner-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Canva's intuitive interface makes custom sizing accessible for novice users while still useful for professionals.

faq.question: Can AI help suggest layouts for custom sizes?
faq.answer: Yes, Canva's AI-driven enhancements can suggest optimal design layouts based on your selected custom size.

faq.question: Does this integrate with automation tools?
faq.answer: Yes, advanced users can integrate custom-sized designs with various automation tools to streamline their workflow.
